name: @realvendex/pi-compat
description_en: Pi-native version compatibility checker for pi.dev extensions — detects which pi APIs an extension uses, validates against known version constraints, warns about deprecated/removed APIs, and suggests migration paths.
description_zh: pi.dev 扩展的 Pi 原生版本兼容性检查器 — 检测扩展使用的 pi API，根据已知版本约束进行验证，警告已弃用/移除的 API，并建议迁移路径
